title: Job Intel Agent
description: Paste a job URL or raw text, upload your CV, and get back a match score (0-100%), ranked skill gaps, talking points, and a tailored pitch. Also rewrites your CV for that specific role.

title: Unity Showcase
description: Interactive 3D product visualization built in Unity. Lets users rotate, zoom, and inspect objects with realistic PBR materials and lighting.

title: 3D Portfolio
description: This site. A spatial portfolio where projects float in 3D space and the camera moves between them. Built with Three.js and vanilla JS.

title: Video Automation
description: Automated video editing pipeline that processes raw footage into polished content. Handles cuts, transitions, overlays, and audio sync programmatically.

title: WebAR
description: Browser-based augmented reality experience that runs without an app install. Uses device camera and WebXR to overlay 3D content on the real world.

title: RAG Tool
description: Retrieval-augmented generation system for querying large document sets. Embeds documents into a vector store and uses LLMs to answer questions with citations.

title: Game Jam
description: A game built in 48 hours for a competitive jam. Fast-paced 2D gameplay with procedural level generation and a custom physics system.

title: CLI Tool
description: Developer productivity tool that runs from the terminal. Automates repetitive project setup, file scaffolding, and config generation tasks.

title: Motion Library
description: A collection of reusable animation primitives for web interfaces. Provides spring physics, easing curves, and gesture-driven motion out of the box.

title: AR Business Card
description: Physical business card that triggers an AR experience when scanned. Displays a 3D model, contact links, and portfolio highlights floating above the card.
